titleStmt.title: SII 29.122: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 122. (A.R. No. B. 192 of 1962-63.) MADDŪRU, ALAMPUR TALUK, MAHABUBNAGAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Third face of the same slab [No. 52] in the ruined fort.

It states that when mahāmaṇḍḷēśvara Kāvaṇa Chōḷa mahārāja was ruling the kingdom from the capital Mosaḷemaḍuvu, made a grant of 20 mattar land measured in the scale Śatyaratnākarana kōlu in Rēkalūru for worship, offerings, etc., of the god Chinchaka Rēchēśvara whose temple was situated on the banks of the river Tungabhadrā at the capital Maddūru located in Aje [Ayije] 300 division.
The record is dated in Chālukya Vikrama year 16, [Śaka 1013] Prajāpati, Mārgaśira, śu, 12, Tuesday corresponding to 1091 A.D., November 25, Tuesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ruha vihita vi
ḷōcana triḷōca
na pramukhā khiḷa pṛ
thyēśvara kārita kāvērī tī
ra karikāla kula
ratna pradīpa kumārāṁ
ku śa śrīmanmahā
maṇḍaḷēśvara kāva
ṇa cōḷa mahārā
jaru mosaḷe maḍuvi
na nelevīḍinoḷiḻdu na
ḍi nāḍumaṁ sukhasaṁka
thā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁge
yyuttamire cāḷukya
vikrama kālada 16 ne
ya prajāpati saṁvatsarada
mārggaśira suddha dvādasi maṁgaḷavāraṁ Line 18 onwards has been engraved on the second face of the slab below No.
saṁkramaṇa parvva nimityamāgi Aje 300 ba
ḷiya rājadhāni maddūralu tuṁgabhadrā nadī
tīrada ciṁcaka rēcēśvara dēvargge sarvvanama
śyamāgi rēkulūra Ūriṁ baḍaga dēva
raṁgabhōgakkaṁ pātrakkaṁ pāvuḷakkaṁ
nivēdyakkaṁ biṭṭa keyi satyaratnākarana
kōlalu biṭṭa matta 20 Idharmma
Digital edition of SII 29.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
